blockedUrlPatterns.title: Blocked URL patterns
blockedUrlPatterns.description: URL patterns where the OpenCode Chrome Bridge refuses to navigate. Each pattern is matched against the page hostname and path (for example 'example.com/admin'). Use '*' as a wildcard. Patterns are case-insensitive; a leading 'http://', 'https://', or 'www.' is ignored. A bare domain with no path is treated as '<domain>/*'.
